APRIL 9, 1908

A ———————————————— e}

CLERK'S CERTIFICATE

The Secretary of the University certified in writing thet due

notice of the meeting had been given in writing to every Trustee.

MINUTES OF PREVIOUS MEETING

The Minutes of the last meeting of January 9, 1908, were read,

approved, and ordered to be engrossed.

EXCUSES

Excuses for absence from this meeting were presented from

Trustees Davis and Shesa.

JUDGES FOR JUNIOR ORATOR AND MACLEAN PRIZE CONTESTS

On the recommendation of the Faculty the following were appoint-

ed Judges for the Junior Orator and Maclean Prize Contests:

Rev. William Courtland Robinson, '8 Rev. Ambrose W. Vernon, '91

Professor Ernest Lacy of the Central High School of Philadelphia.

And as alternetes:

f98

-

Hon. Ezra Permelee Prentice,.

Rev. Samuel C. Hodge, '88.

REMIT REFERRED TO COMMITTEE ON GRADUATE SCHOOL

A remit from the Faculty was referred to the Committee on the

Graduate School.

GIFT FROM SCHUYLER B. JACKSON

The Secretary of the University reported the receipt of a portralt of Colonel Huntington W. Jackson, Class of 1863, a gift to the University from his brother, Mr. Schuyler B. Jackson.

=er =
